reasons: MicroLED segment is waste of capital for CPO/photonics exposure
volume shipments likely H2 2028 or H1 2029
better to look at other business segments
mentions.text:
IMO anything MicroLED is a waste of capital for CPO/photonics exposure over the next year.

Names like ams-OSRAM/AUO/Ennostar/Tyntek/PlayNitride, etc. 

Any volume shipments would probably be H2 2028 or H1 2029 if it even takes off from development stage. 

You're better looking at them for their other business segments.
